title: line~
cyclone/line~
description: a bang is sent when final target is reached

messages.description: jumps immediately to that value unless duration is set to other than 0 via the second inlet
pairs that specify target value and duration (in ms) to reach it (maximum is 128 target-time pairs). For an odd number of elements, the last element is treated as another pair with 0 ms duration
sets the time for the next float send to the left inlet
current value or a ramp towards the target
a bang is sent when final target is reached

arguments.description: sets an initial value for the signal output

methods.description: restores the output after being paused
stops and clears pending target-time parameter triples (but continues outputting its last value)

body: [line~] generates signal ramps or envelopes. It takes a target and a duration (in ms) values and generates a ramp from its current value to the target value in that period. Target and duration can be set as a list or in different inlets.
